seo.title: PII Filtering for AI Agents in Vercel AI SDK Agents
seo.description: How to detect and fix pii filtering for ai agents in Vercel AI SDK agents. Framework-specific detection, fixes, and Vex automation.

content.intro: In Vercel AI SDK agents, PII filtering failures occur when streaming responses from `generateText` or `streamText` bypass validation, exposing sensitive data like emails or phone numbers in real-time UIs. Tool calls returning unfiltered user data from databases or APIs compound the issue, as results are directly rendered without PII redaction. Edge runtime constraints exacerbate this, limiting complex filtering during high-throughput agent interactions.

howItManifests.scenario: Streaming agent responses with hallucinated PII
howItManifests.symptom: Partial tokens in `streamText` contain realistic-looking emails/SSNs before completion
howItManifests.impact: Real-time UI displays unfiltered PII during typing effect, violating GDPR/CCPA

howItManifests.scenario: Tool call results from user database queries
howItManifests.symptom: Structured tool outputs with `generateObject` include raw customer emails/phone numbers
howItManifests.impact: Frontend directly renders unvalidated tool results exposing PII to end-users

howItManifests.scenario: Multi-turn agent conversations with context retention
howItManifests.symptom: Previous user messages containing PII re-emerge in agent summaries via `streamUI`
howItManifests.impact: Conversation history leaks PII across sessions in persistent chat UIs

howItManifests.scenario: Edge function timeouts during PII scanning
howItManifests.symptom: Complex regex/LLM PII detection times out in 5s Vercel edge runtime
howItManifests.impact: Unfiltered responses served during peak traffic due to filtering timeouts

vexAutomation.heading: Automating PII Filtering for AI Agents Detection with Vex
vexAutomation.description:
Vex provides middleware integration for Vercel AI SDK that automatically detects and redacts PII across `generateText`, `streamText`, and `generateObject` calls. The SDK wraps your existing agent patterns with zero-config PII scanning using regex, LLM classification, and custom rulesets. Detection happens in <50ms even on Vercel edge runtime.

Vex captures 100% of streaming tokens, tool call arguments/results, and conversation history for continuous PII monitoring. False positives are auto-tuned per application, and redacted data is logged for compliance audits. Integration requires one line of middleware in your AI route handlers.

Remediation is automatic: PII is replaced inline during streaming, tool calls are blocked before execution, and risky conversations trigger human review workflows. Vex maintains type safety with Vercel AI SDK's Zod schemas while enforcing PII policies.

cta.heading: Detect and Fix This Automatically with Vex
cta.description: Install Vex middleware in 60 seconds to block PII leaks across all your Vercel AI SDK agents
